Short CV

Ayşegül YANIK İLGAR undergraduated from Molecular Biology and Genetics Department, Faculty of Science, Istanbul University in 2017. She started Master Program in the Yeast Genetics,Technology and Genomics Research Laboratory. She is still going on this program with her advisor, assistant professor Çağatay Tarhan. She has been working as research assistant at Moleculer Biology and Genetics, Faculty of Engineering and Naturel Sciences, Uskudar University since March 2020.
